name: Chronostation
short_description: Sci-fi Tower Defense real-time strategy with pleasant adaptive music. Play as a commander of a space station which got stuck in a time anomaly.
detailed_description:
Just Updated

Hello,

I've been thinking a lot about the price, which some found high. However, it was only set that way due to fees; realistically, I receive only half of that price from sales, and then I still have to pay taxes on that amount in my country.

It's a bit of a longer, and I think interesting and not very common, story, and things happened that I didn't expect. For example, not getting permission for Early Access.

Since I don't want to elaborate too much here, if anyone is interested in more than just the story, they can write to me anytime.

I hope the price of 5 USD will entice those who have this game on their Wishlist but haven't purchased it yet, and that they will support me so I can minimize my moral debt.

For me, games were never about business, but about showing and proving what I'm capable of, and that those who rejected me were mistaken. Also, to bring something interesting to others – whether it's fun, relaxation, or something to learn. Unfortunately, it didn't work out. It happens. I'm just sorry that I couldn't manage to at least fully compensate those who voluntarily helped me with the creation of this game. And that Phase 2 – the MMO version of this game – will ultimately not happen.

Take care.

Not everyone who creates and releases games thinks only about their wallet; they just usually aren't seen in this jungle.

Sincerely, Manfromstars


About the Game

You are a commander of a space station on an asteroid mining mission somewhere in deep space. From one of the asteroids you dig out parts of an ancient alien spaceship. An accident happens after extracting and moving them on board of your station and you find yourself transported into unknown place and time. Now you are trying to understand where you are and how to get back home. Fortunately, asteroids around you are rich with crystals containing chroniton particles which are crucial for your return. But soon you discover that you are not alone, and your station is under attack from ships of an unknown alien race. Attempts at communication fail so you are forced to defend yourself while you are trying to resolve your current situation. You hope that if you mine enough resources, you'll be able to improve your chances by research, destroy the enemy, and finally return home.

Enemy ships of various types will swarm your station in 100 waves.

You can build various defensive towers, energy grid and other types of space structures to aid in your defense.

With research you can improve quality of your space structures and increase your chances of survival.

Even if your space station appears to be destroyed many times, it is not actually destroyed but only returns in time and space because of the anomaly caused by the alien ship parts. A part of your mined resources remains and is converted into research resources through chroniton particles.

Great adaptive music from talented composer Marek Hradil aka "Mad Maverick" contributes to the game's atmosphere.

The adaptive music has been implemented using welove.audio Engine.

supported_languages: English, Czech, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, French, Italian, Arabic, Russian
